column12: Measurement condition : Clear; Partly Cloudy , No Precipitation , Calm Wind Swirling/Variable
column13: Clear, some vegetation at edges, some debris on downstream train bridge.
column14: @ Uncertainty: QRev Uncertainty Analysis (DS Mueller, 2016), 2-sigma value (1 x Uncertainty Value reported in *.xml File). @ Left edge Q is greater than 5% in 3 of 4 transects. Getting vloser to left edge was too shallow to measure with ADCP. The percent of invalid ensembles exceeds 25% in one edge, 10 valid ensembles though. Moving-Bed Test: Bottom track and GPS results do not agree. No moving bed, some interference with GPS during loop test. Used BT for measurement, similar Q using GGA. DWL from primary, no reset applied. Stage stable. Used logger values for MGH ADCP by Moving Boat
HG: 4.571 DWL

column12: Measurement condition : Clear; Partly Cloudy , Moderate Rain , Very Light Wind Blowing Cross Stream
column14: SUMMARY FILE RE-SUBMITTED. MOVING BED TEST FAILED FIRST ATTEMPT DUE TO INTERFERENCE FROM BRIDGE PIER. @ Uncertainty: QRev Uncertainty Analysis (DS Mueller, 2016), 2-sigma value (1 x Uncertainty Value reported in *.xml File). @ Low stage and discharge at gauge. No visible debris or ice downstream. Measurement was affected by a bridge pillar toward the left bak which caused issues with boat control on the first two transects. Second two transects were better, flow increased slightly and boat could handle better. Measurement lost GPS, likely due to interference from the bridge deck. BT used, no moving bed found. Measurement was good quality with 4 transects all of similar values. Raining during measurement causing slight increase in stage and discharge throughout measurement. Small reset found at arrival, reset. Used logged values for MGH after measurement. ADCP by Moving Boat
HG: 3.920 DWL

OTT appears to not have moved. No SRC found, not reset. Mid-section

column14: Good measurement. Very slow velocity. No problems. QRev summary file will not open corectly on my computer. Vegetation is channel. Small spike in velocity on first transect due to river otter swimming around ADCP. @ Uncertainty: QRev Uncertainty Analysis (DS Mueller, 2016), 2-sigma value (1 x Uncertainty Value reported in *.xml File). @ DWL from primary found large reset. Took water level from WWG and applied WWG GC to findings. WWG water level with GC applied is equal to the water level from primary, confirming that the primary is accurate. Took water levels from both after measurement and then reset logger. Used WL from primary for reset and MGH to avoid using GC. ADCP by Moving Boat
GC: 0.000 HG: 3.688 Found (FD)

MGH calculated from average of logger values: 14:30 through 15:30. Measured between hwy bridge and railway bridge: approx 20m u/s of rail bridge. Towards left bank, conventional meter was not working (too slow) and depths were too great for Flowtracker. Used Flowtracker velocity at or near 0.5 depth with coefficient 0.88 when depths too great for 0.8 method. Velocities stable throughout measurement, across both 0.5 and 0.2/0.8 measurement points. This location could be used with 5m FlowTracker but should not be used with 2m Flowtracker. Sources:Manual,Import
